name: 🚀 v3.0.0 - Ultra-Fast with Script Bug Fix
body:
## ⚡ Performance
- Connection pooling for 2-3x speedup
- Batch operations support

## 🔧 Fixed
- Script reload bug - scripts appear immediately now

## 🎮 New Commands
- duplicate_node, reparent_node, rename_node
- undo, redo, select_node
- get_node_info with script verification

## 🚀 Quick Start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/pavlos1323456/godot-openclaw-bridge.git
cd godot-openclaw-bridge
python godot_bridge_v3.py
```

See QUICKSTART.md for 60-second setup!
